issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Sequential Researcher-Writer-Editor pipeline with AgentGroupChat
scenarios.rationale: Baseline called the OpenAI API directly with no Semantic Kernel primitives; treatment composes ChatCompletionAgents in AgentGroupChat with SequentialSelectionStrategy and KernelFunctionTerminationStrategy(max_iterations=6).

scenarios.name: Parallel multi-agent market analysis with synthesizer
scenarios.rationale: Baseline correctly fanned out with asyncio.gather but used raw chat completions; treatment uses ChatCompletionAgent.invoke per agent under asyncio.gather and a synthesizer agent as the skill describes.
